message:
Command `
# 2h50m CPU / ~46min elapsed. 2nd iteration started at 10% with 81,164 violations.
# DRT1 2nd iteration 10% = 81,164 violations. PERFECT MATCH!
# 2nd iteration should complete in ~17min elapsed.
# Remaining iterations: 3rd (11934→2428), then many fast ones → convergence to 4 violations.
# After DRT completes: signoff steps (StreamOut, DRC, LVS) take ~30-60 min.
# Estimate: 0th=19min, 1st=18min, 2nd=17min, 3rd=18min, then fast iterations.
# Total routing: ~1h30m elapsed. Current: 46min. ~44 more min for routing iterations.
# Then signoff: ~30min. TOTAL ESTIMATE: done by ~05:30 local time.
# 
# Continue monitoring every 2 minutes.

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 120
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$(date +%H:%M:%S)] EXITED!" && break

    dd if=/proc/1100961/fd/11 bs=65536 count=512 >> /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null &
    PD=$!; sleep 5; kill $PD 2>/dev/null; wait $PD 2>/dev/null

    CPUTIME=$(ps -p $ORPID -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    PIPEBYTES=$(wc -c < /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATESTMSG=$(tail -2 /tmp/drt2_pipe.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    STEPS=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -2 | tr '\n' ',')
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] CPU=$CPUTIME PIPE=${PIPEBYTES}B FINAL=$FINAL STEPS=$STEPS | $LATESTMSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
done
` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash
